roa.docketEntryComment: Petition for Revocation of Parole PC 3000.08, PC 1203.2
Promise to Appear on Court Own Recognizance

/CAL:PAROLE PHC/X:STATE PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR PRESENT VIA ZOOM/NP/X:PAROLEE HAS ALREADY REGISTERED AS A PC 290 SEX OFFENDER AND HAD GPS MONITORPLACED ON HIM AS VERIFIED BY THE PAROLE AGENT/DAWT/PAJ:9 DAYS/X:WITH TIMELOST/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 9 DAYS/4019HALF/X:BALANCE OF PETITION IS DISMISSED/X:ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN THE SAME/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/CTORD: PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/  /PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #1, ABSCONDING, WITH TIME LOST,/X:SENTENCING WILL BE DELAYED,/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE COURT ORDERSTHAT MR, WALKER MUST REGISTER AS A PC 290 SEX OFFENDER AND MUST HAVE A GPSMONITOR PLACED,/X:FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CONDITIONS OF RELEASE WILL RESULT IN IMPOSITION OF A 45 DAY HAMMER ,/X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
